name: Sentisearch, Inc.
summary: SentiSearch, Inc., a development stage company, holds a license to develop, manufacture, have made, import, use, sell, distribute, rent, or lease products and services in the areas of insect chemosensation and olfaction. It also has patent applications relating to nucleic acids and proteins of insect or odorant receptor genes and their uses. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in New York, New York.
